items.caption: A large semi-truck on a snowy road with a gps tracking device attached to its cab. the gps device is prominently displayed in the foreground, suggesting its importance for vehicle tracking. the truck is depicted in motion, driving away from the viewer, with a clear sky and a hint of a body of water in the background. the snowy conditions indicate a cold, possibly winter setting. likely used to illustrate the functionality of the gps tracking device for long-term vehicle tracking.
